name: Deferred - Vision - 1
description: First returns for visions, prophecies, and unsettling signs.

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] A vision first granted in {origin} returned in sleep, silence, or symbol before you were ready to interpret it.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] What you had seen in {origin} began repeating itself in ways too orderly to dismiss as chance.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer vision 2 1d6] A sign first noticed in {origin} returned with details memory had not invented.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] The old vision from {origin} resumed its claim on your attention just when you had nearly succeeded in treating it as symbolism.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] Something seen or dreamt in {origin} proved unwilling to remain merely symbolic.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer vision 2 1d6] The sign from {origin} returned with enough force to make silence feel evasive.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] A prophecy, omen, or strange image from {origin} began fitting the world too well for comfort.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] Whatever {sourceTitle} had opened in your inner sight during {origin} had not yet chosen to close.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer vision 2 1d6] The old vision from {origin} returned not as certainty, but as insistence.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] A sign from {origin} began appearing in forms too varied to be dismissed and too coherent to leave uninterpreted.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] What you had once glimpsed in {origin} returned with a timing that made disbelief look lazy.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer vision 2 1d6] The image from {origin} began to feel less like memory than instruction, which prudence did not approve.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] A vision from {origin} acquired one confirming detail too many to leave untroubled.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] What had seemed merely strange in {origin} began to seem addressed specifically to you.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer vision 2 1d6] The sign from {origin} kept returning until doubt and belief both had reason to feel uneasy.
results.name: vision-1

results.description: [defer vision 2 1d6] The vision from {origin} resumed itself with enough force that you began looking for fulfillment rather than explanation.
results.name: vision-1
